ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER ON DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, NBS DEFAULT SERVICES, LLC, DOES 1 TO 10 HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER ON DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE IS OFF CALENDAR; TRO IS DISSOLVED. PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1150, "[I]F THE RESPONDING PARTY HAS NOT APPEARED, THE OSC MUST BE SERVED IN THE SAME MANNER AS A SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT." PURSUANT TO JANUARY 8, 2015 ORDER PLAINTIFF WAS TO SERVE THE DEFENDANTS WITH THE ORDER AND SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN JANUARY 9, 2015 AND FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE NO LATER THAN JANUARY 20, 2015. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON JANUARY 12, 2015 INDICATES THAT ONLY THE ORDER (NOT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT) WAS SERVED AND THAT THE SERVICE WAS ACCOMPLISHED BY SERVING "CHRIS BLACKTON, EMPLOYEE OF AUCTION.COM, AGENT FOR NORTHSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC AND NBS DEFAULT SERVICES, LLC." THIS IS NOT PROPER MANNER OF SERVICE ON AN INCORPORATED ENTITY. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF FILED ON JANUARY 16, 2015 WAS NOT AUTHORIZED BY THE COURT AND IS STRICKEN. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: N. WONG; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is OFF CALENDAR, Plaintiff failed to serve all named defendants with the Summons and Complaint, TRO and OSC re: Preliminary Injunction. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order On Defendants Nationstar Mortgage Llc, Nbs Default Services, Llc, Does 1 To 10
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by either party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order On Defendants Nationstar Mortgage IS OFF CALENDAR; TRO is dissolved. Pursuant to CRC 3.1150, "[i]f the responding party has not appeared, the OSC must be served in the same manner as a summons and complaint." Pursuant to January 8, 2015 Order Plaintiff was to serve the Defendants with the Order and Summons and Complaint no later than January 9, 2015 and file a Proof of Service no later than January 20, 2015. Proof of Service filed on January 12, 2015 indicates that only the Order (not the Summons and Complaint) was served and that the service was accomplished by serving "Chris Blackton, employee of Auction.com, agent for Northstar Mortgage, LLC and NBS Default Services, LLC." This is not proper manner of service on an incorporated entity. Supplemental Brief filed on January 16, 2015 was not authorized by the Court and is stricken.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported
